text: ®E S3 Access Points O tmsteancaitis @ st e Simplify managing access to S3 Buckets/Objects e Rather than 1 bucket w/ 1 Bucket Policy ... e .. Create many access points ¢ .. each with different policies ¢ .. each with different network access controls e Each access point has its own endpoint address ¢ Created via Console or aws s3control create-access-point --name secretcats --account-id 123456789012 --bucket catpics
